title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 9.192
text:
9.192.  Show-Me freedom from opioid addiction decade designated. — The years of 2018 to 2028 shall hereby be designated as the "Show-Me Freedom from Opioid Addiction Decade".
(L. 2018 S.B. 718 merged with S.B. 951) 
Effective 7-06-18 (S.B. 718); 8-28-18 (S.B. 951)
